verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I am predestinated by God’s foreknowledge, For He knew that I will serve Him, From the start He Knew that I see the light And conform to His own message, That’s why He placed the seed in my heart.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I may not understand it And I may not comprehend it, But I know He said it, So I believe it.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: How can we sin if we’re born of Him And how can we sin if the seed remain, For before I ever knew, He has me on His thinking, That’s why He placed the seed in my heart.
